title: hobbies
text:
I’ve loved drawing ever since I could form conscious memory. To me, drawing will always be my favorite way to create art.

title: hobbies
text:
Going to Art Museums
As a lifelong artist, I love seeking inspiration from artists of the past by going to art museums. Whether it’s Chinese guohua (traditional painting) or elaborate Pre-Raphaelite Brotherhood paintings, I love to be able to admire a piece with my own eyes.

title: hobbies
text:
Solo Travel
I went on my first solo trip to New York City when I was 18, and ever since then I’ve loved solo travelling. My most recent solo trip was to Guangzhou, China.
